tool.name: aoptk download abstracts
tool.description: Download abstracts for a list of publication IDs.

configfiles.configfile:
from aoptk.literature.databases.pubmed import PubMed from aoptk.literature.databases.europepmc import EuropePMC from aoptk.literature.abstract import Abstract from Bio import Entrez import os
with open("$input_file", "r") as f: ids = [line.strip() for line in f.readlines()] email = os.environ.get("EMAIL")
if "${literature_database}" == "pubmed": Entrez.email = email pubmed = PubMed.__new__(PubMed) pubmed.id_list = ids abstracts = pubmed.get_abstracts() elif "${literature_database}" == "europepmc": europepmc = EuropePMC("") europepmc.id_list = ids abstracts = europepmc.get_abstracts() else: raise ValueError("Select valid database.")
for abstract in abstracts: with open(f"{abstract.publication_id}.txt", "w") as f: f.write(abstract.text)

param.name: literature_database
param.label: Select which database to search.
param.help: PubMed only accepts searches with up to 10 000 results. No limit for Europe PMC.

tool.help:
Chemical Identification ===================
Tool to identify chemical entities in a given text.
